thing-type.label: SmartThings Television
thing-type.description: A Samsung Smart TV connected via SmartThings Cloud.

parameter.name: deviceId
parameter.label: Device ID
parameter.description: SmartThings device UUID. Find it via GET https://api.smartthings.com/v1/devices.

parameter.name: pollingIntervalSeconds
parameter.label: Polling Interval (s)
parameter.description: How often to poll the SmartThings API for status updates.

channel-type.label: Mute
channel-type.description: TV audio mute state — ON = muted

channel-type.label: Input Source
channel-type.description: Active input source (e.g. digitalTv, HDMI1, HDMI2)

channel-type.label: Supported Input Sources
channel-type.description: Available input sources as id=name pairs (e.g. dtv=TV, HDMI2=Nvidia Shield)

channel-type.label: TV Channel
channel-type.description: Current TV channel number — send a channel number string to change channel

channel-type.label: Channel Up
channel-type.description: Send ON to go to the next TV channel

channel-type.label: Channel Down
channel-type.description: Send ON to go to the previous TV channel

channel-type.label: Picture Mode
channel-type.description: TV picture mode (e.g. Standard, Movie, Dynamic)

channel-type.label: Supported Picture Modes
channel-type.description: Comma-separated list of available picture modes

channel-type.label: Sound Mode
channel-type.description: TV sound mode (e.g. Standard, Music, Movie)

channel-type.label: Supported Sound Modes
channel-type.description: Comma-separated list of available sound modes

channel-type.label: Playback Status
channel-type.description: Media playback status (playing, paused, stopped, etc.)
